title: Rough Dried Norwegian Samphire Skewers
description: A quick-fix Norwegian dish featuring samphire, this vegan-friendly recipe is sour and shaggy, perfect for a snack. The samphire is brine-dried to bring out its unique flavor.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 200 degrees Fahrenheit.
Rinse the samphire and cut it into 1-inch pieces.
In a large bowl, whisk together the vinegar, water, salt, and black pepper to make a brine.
Add the samphire to the brine and let it sit for 10 minutes.
Remove the samphire from the brine and place it on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Drizzle the olive oil over the samphire and sprinkle with minced garlic.
Bake the samphire in the oven for 15 minutes, or until it is dry and slightly caramelized.
Remove the samphire from the oven and let it cool completely.
Thread the cooled samphire onto skewers and serve with a squeeze of lemon juice.
